title: Could not find `rootlessport` on main branch but not on 3.4.0 - rootlessport is in PATH, but not favored
body:
I has building from source and missed the fact that I am not on `3.4.0`, I proceeded like that.

1. I am not installing the programs in a global PATH, I am installing them in `$PROJECT_HOME/.local/bin`
2. In a wrapper script, I modify `PATH=$PROJECT_HOME/.local/bin:$PATH`
3. After installing `podman` there and `rootlessport` and `podman-remote`, it complains it cannot find `rootlessport` which it should not, it is just right next to it and also exposed to the `PATH`

`Error: could not find "rootlessport" in one of [/usr/local/libexec/podman /usr/local/lib/podman /usr/libexec/podman /usr/lib/podman]`

comments.body: This is a helper binary and should not be installed in PATH because users should not use it directly. It should be installed in a libexec directory. If you have no access to the listed directories you can change it in containers.conf, see https://github.com/containers/common/blob/main/pkg/config/containers.conf#L344-L351
